_comment: Per-user expected geography/ASN. Used by score_indicators.py to flag logins from countries/orgs outside the user's pattern. Update as people relocate, travel for extended periods, or shift their network setup.

_default.notes: Fallback when a user is not in the baseline. Most companyDomain staff are in US or CA; non-US/CA logins for an unbaselined user should still be reviewed.
